about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a web developer passionate about creating exceptional digital experiences. With more than {years} years of experience, I focus on modern, scalable, user-centered web applications.
about.bio2: My goal is to turn ideas into digital solutions that make a real impact. I love learning new technologies and tackling complex challenges.
